# chalk_azure_cloud_credentials (Resource)

Chalk Azure cloud credentials resource for configuring Azure authentication

**Required permissions:** `project.create`



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Azure cloud credentials name
- `region` (String) Azure region
- `resource_group` (String) Azure resource group
- `subscription_id` (String) Azure subscription ID
- `tenant_id` (String) Azure tenant ID

### Optional

- `container_registry_config` (Block List) Azure Container Registry configuration (optional, max 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--container_registry_config))
- `docker_build_config` (Block List) Docker build configuration (optional, max 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--docker_build_config))
- `gcp_workload_identity` (Block List) GCP workload identity configuration for Azure (optional, max 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--gcp_workload_identity))
- `key_vault_config` (Block List) Azure Key Vault configuration (optional, max 1) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--key_vault_config))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Azure cloud credentials identifier

<a id="nestedblock--container_registry_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `container_registry_config`

Optional:

- `registry_name` (String) Azure Container Registry name


<a id="nestedblock--docker_build_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `docker_build_config`

Optional:

- `builder` (String) Docker builder configuration
- `notification_topic` (String) Topic to receive build notifications. Accepts a GCP Pub/Sub topic path (`projects/<project>/topics/<topic>`).
- `push_registry_tag_prefix` (String) Docker push registry tag prefix
- `push_registry_type` (String) Docker push registry type
- `registry_credentials_secret_id` (String, Sensitive) Docker registry credentials secret ID


<a id="nestedblock--gcp_workload_identity"></a>
### Nested Schema for `gcp_workload_identity`

Optional:

- `pool_id` (String) GCP workload identity pool ID
- `project_number` (String) GCP project number for workload identity federation
- `provider_id` (String) GCP workload identity provider ID
- `service_account` (String) GCP service account email for workload identity


<a id="nestedblock--key_vault_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `key_vault_config`

Optional:

- `vault_name` (String) Azure Key Vault name
